_meta.description: Machine-readable Pipecat deprecation/removal registry. Consumed by tooling such as check_deprecation (Pipecat Context Hub). Human-readable form lives in CHANGELOG.md; this file is the structured mirror so tools never have to parse prose.

provenance.seeded_by: one-time LLM backfill of GitHub release notes (### Deprecated / ### Removed sections)
provenance.unreleased_fragments_at_proposal: none (no *.deprecated.md / *.removed.md pending), so the backfill is current as of this commit
provenance.verification: 0/576 symbols hallucinated (every subject + replacement target traces verbatim to its source release note); 0 self-replacements; 2 records flagged confidence=low. The source-tree existence oracle (does each symbol still exist at its tagged version?) has NOT yet been run.
provenance.how_to_rebackfill: Re-run the structuring over release notes published after v1.3.0 to extend, or re-derive all records from CHANGELOG.md to regenerate. Update covered_through_release + generated_on when you do.

record_schema.subject: deprecated/removed symbol; dotted Owner.member for members
record_schema.owner: owning class for member kinds (stays current), else null
record_schema.source_version: release the record was derived from

entries.subject: WorkerRunner.run.worker
entries.migration: Register the worker with WorkerRunner.add_workers() before calling run().
entries.notes: Subject is the 'worker' argument to run(); replacement is a different method add_workers().

entries.subject: PipelineRunner
entries.notes: Renamed AND moved; treated as rename (same thing, new name) with new location noted in migration.

entries.subject: Language.KA
entries.migration: Georgian language mapping removed from SonioxSTTService.
entries.notes: Unsupported language mapping removal; treated as a member (field) of SonioxSTTService.

entries.subject: ResampyResampler
entries.notes: Replaced by a different existing resampler class, not a rename.

entries.subject: OpenPipeLLMService
entries.migration: OpenPipe acquired/unmaintained; use underlying provider directly or OpenAILLMService with base_url.
entries.notes: External cause (vendor) AND a use-existing alternative (OpenAILLMService). reason=vendor_gone, relation=use_existing.

entries.subject: NoisereduceFilter
entries.migration: Use system-level noise reduction or a service-based alternative.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_in_enabled
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_in_is_live
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_out_enabled
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_out_is_live
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_out_width
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_out_height
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_out_color
entries.migration: Use the video_in_* and video_out_* equivalents instead.
entries.notes: Replacement family (video_*) named generically, not per-param verbatim, so targets empty.

entries.subject: FrameProcessor.wait_for_task
entries.migration: Use create_task() and the built-in TaskManager instead.

entries.subject: create_default_resampler
entries.notes: Module-level function in pipecat.audio.utils; no owner class, treated as bare symbol/method.

entries.subject: LLMService.arguments
entries.migration: Functions must use named parameters instead of a single arguments parameter.
entries.notes: Single-argument function call support removed; subject is the 'arguments' param of function calls on LLMService.

entries.subject: RTVIConfig
entries.migration: Use the updated RTVI processor API instead.

entries.subject: RTVIServiceConfig
entries.migration: Use the updated RTVI processor API instead.

entries.subject: RTVIServiceOptionConfig
entries.migration: Use the updated RTVI processor API instead.

entries.subject: RTVIActionFrame
entries.migration: Use the updated RTVI processor API instead.

entries.subject: RTVIProcessor.handle_function_call
entries.migration: Use the updated RTVI processor API instead.

entries.subject: RTVIProcessor.handle_function_call_start
entries.migration: Use the updated RTVI processor API instead.

entries.subject: TTSService.say
entries.migration: Push a TTSSpeakFrame into the pipeline instead.

entries.subject: LLMService.start_callback
entries.migration: Register an on_llm_response_start event handler instead.

entries.subject: PipelineParams.observers
entries.migration: Pass observers directly to PipelineTask constructor instead.

entries.subject: pipecat.services.ai_services
entries.migration: Import from the per-service modules instead.

entries.subject: pipecat.services.gemini_multimodal_live
entries.migration: Use pipecat.services.google.gemini_live; class names drop 'Multimodal' (GeminiMultimodalLiveLLMService -> GeminiLiveLLMService).

entries.subject: VisionImageFrameAggregator
entries.migration: Vision/image handling is now built into LLMContext.

entries.subject: LLMMessagesFrame
entries.migration: Use LLMContextFrame, or LLMMessagesUpdateFrame with run_llm=True.

entries.subject: AnthropicLLMContext
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: AnthropicContextAggregatorPair
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: AWSBedrockLLMContext
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: AWSBedrockContextAggregatorPair
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: OpenAIContextAggregatorPair
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: BaseLLMResponseAggregator
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: LLMContextResponseAggregator
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: LLMUserResponseAggregator
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: LLMAssistantResponseAggregator
entries.migration: Superseded by the universal LLMContext system; use LLMContext / LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: PipelineParams.allow_interruptions
entries.migration: Interruptions are now always allowed by default.

entries.subject: StartFrame.allow_interruptions
entries.migration: Interruptions are now always allowed by default.

entries.subject: FrameProcessor.allow_interruptions
entries.migration: Interruptions are now always allowed by default.

entries.subject: pipecat.processors.transcript_processor
entries.notes: TranscriptProcessor/TranscriptProcessorConfig module removed; replacement is observers (not a named symbol).

entries.subject: ExternalUserTurnStrategies
entries.migration: Removed along with the automatic fallback in LLMUserAggregator.

entries.subject: TransportParams.vad_analyzer
entries.migration: VAD and turn detection now handled entirely by LLMUserAggregator.

entries.subject: TransportParams.turn_analyzer
entries.migration: VAD and turn detection now handled entirely by LLMUserAggregator.

entries.subject: DeepgramSTTService.vad_events
entries.migration: Use Silero VAD for voice activity detection instead.

entries.subject: DeepgramSTTService.should_interrupt
entries.migration: Use Silero VAD for voice activity detection instead.

entries.subject: UserIdleProcessor
entries.migration: Use LLMUserAggregator with the user_idle_timeout parameter instead.

entries.subject: UserBotLatencyLogObserver
entries.migration: Use UserBotLatencyObserver with its on_latency_measured event handler.

entries.subject: DeprecatedModuleProxy
entries.migration: Flat service imports no longer work; use full submodule path.

entries.subject: PIPECAT_OBSERVER_FILES
entries.notes: Environment variable rename.

entries.subject: GladiaSTTService.language
entries.notes: Field of GladiaInputParams; owner recorded as GladiaSTTService per bullet subject.

entries.subject: InputParams
entries.notes: Generic 'InputParams class alias' for Gladia; not a globally-unique name, low confidence on subject identity.

entries.subject: GoogleVertexLLMService.InputParams
entries.migration: Use direct init params; project_id required, location defaults to us-east4.

entries.subject: pipecat.transports.network
entries.migration: Update imports to pipecat.transports.websocket.* / webrtc.* etc.

entries.subject: TTSService.add_word_timestamps
entries.migration: No longer supports 'Reset'/'TTSStoppedFrame' sentinel strings; use append_to_audio_context with TTSStoppedFrame.
entries.notes: Method itself not removed; sentinel-string support removed (behavior change). Recorded against the method.

entries.subject: SambaNovaSTTService
entries.migration: SambaNova no longer offers STT; use another STT provider.

entries.subject: SimliVideoService.InputParams
entries.migration: Use direct constructor params max_session_length, max_idle_time, enable_logging.

entries.subject: AudioContextTTSService
entries.migration: Subclass WebsocketTTSService directly; audio context mgmt now in base TTSService.

entries.subject: AudioContextWordTTSService
entries.migration: Subclass WebsocketTTSService directly; audio context mgmt now in base TTSService.

entries.subject: WordTTSService
entries.migration: Word timestamp logic always active in TTSService.

entries.subject: WebsocketWordTTSService
entries.migration: Word timestamp logic always active in TTSService.

entries.subject: InterruptibleWordTTSService
entries.migration: Word timestamp logic always active in TTSService.

entries.subject: TTSService.supports_word_timestamps
entries.migration: Word timestamp logic now always active; remove the argument.

entries.subject: set_model
entries.notes: Methods on AI services generally; no single owner class named, recorded as bare symbol.

entries.subject: settings
entries.migration: Pass typed settings delta objects via delta={...} instead of settings={...}.
entries.notes: Dict-based settings= arg across *UpdateSettingsFrame classes; generic owner.

entries.subject: WordTTSService
entries.notes: Duplicate of 0.0.105 deprecation; here migration targets non-word counterpart with supports_word_timestamps=True.

entries.subject: SmartTurnMetricsData
entries.migration: Use TurnMetricsData; BaseSmartTurn emits it directly.

entries.subject: LLMContextSummarizationConfig
entries.migration: Use LLMAutoContextSummarizationConfig with a nested LLMContextSummaryConfig.

entries.subject: RTVILLMFunctionCallMessage
entries.migration: Use the llm-function-call-in-progress event from RTVIObserver.

entries.subject: RTVILLMFunctionCallMessageData
entries.migration: Use the llm-function-call-in-progress event from RTVIObserver.

entries.subject: RTVIProcessor.handle_function_call
entries.migration: Use the llm-function-call-in-progress event from RTVIObserver.

entries.subject: TurnAnalyzerUserTurnStopStrategy.timeout
entries.migration: Timeout now managed internally based on STT latency.

entries.subject: BaseInputTransport.vad_analyzer
entries.migration: Pass vad_analyzer to LLMUserAggregatorParams or use VADProcessor.

entries.subject: OpenAILLMContext
entries.migration: Use the universal LLMContext and LLMContextAggregatorPair.

entries.subject: TranscriptionMessage
entries.migration: Use the new aggregator turn events.

entries.subject: ThoughtTranscriptionMessage
entries.migration: Use the new aggregator turn events.

entries.subject: TranscriptionUpdateFrame
entries.migration: Use the new aggregator turn events.

entries.subject: DeepgramSTTService.vad_events
entries.migration: Use a local Silero VAD for VAD events.

entries.subject: DeepgramSTTService.should_interrupt
entries.migration: Will be removed with vad_events support.

entries.subject: AICFilter.noise_gate_enable
entries.migration: No effect; noise gating automatic. Use AICFilter.create_vad_analyzer() for VAD.

entries.subject: TTSService.text_aggregator
entries.migration: Use the new LLMTextProcessor to override aggregation behavior.

entries.subject: MiniMaxHttpTTSService.english_normalization
entries.notes: Replacement 'test_normalization' is almost certainly a typo for text_normalization, but kept verbatim per hard rule.

entries.subject: LLMAssistantAggregatorParams.expect_stripped_words
entries.migration: Ignored with the newer LLMAssistantAggregator; word spacing handled automatically.

entries.subject: PlayHTTTSService
entries.migration: PlayHT shutting down their API Dec 31 2025.

entries.subject: PlayHTHttpTTSService
entries.migration: PlayHT shutting down their API Dec 31 2025.

entries.subject: DailyUpdateRemoteParticipantsFrame
entries.migration: Create a custom frame and handle it in on_after_push_frame or a custom processor.

entries.subject: NoisereduceFilter
entries.migration: Use other audio filters like KrispFilter or AICFilter.

entries.subject: pipecat.runner.daily.configure_with_args
entries.notes: Function in pipecat.runner.daily; recorded as dotted module-qualified function.

entries.subject: AudioBufferProcessor.user_continuos_stream
entries.notes: Param name 'user_continuos_stream' is misspelled in the changelog; kept verbatim per hard rule.

entries.subject: DailyTransport.send_dtmf
entries.migration: Push an OutputDTMFFrame or OutputDTMFUrgentFrame instead.

entries.subject: on_push_frame
entries.notes: Observer callback signature change; subject is the on_push_frame event/callback.

entries.subject: TransportParams.camera_*
entries.notes: Glob 'camera_*' is the verbatim token used; replacement video_* also glob, no verbatim per-name target.

entries.subject: create_context_aggregator.user_kwargs
entries.notes: Param of create_context_aggregator(); recorded as that function's param.

entries.subject: pipecat.services.ai_services
entries.migration: Import base classes from the per-service modules.

entries.subject: LLMService.register_function.start_callback
entries.migration: Move the start-callback code into the function call.
entries.notes: start_callback arg to register_function().

entries.subject: AWSTTSService
entries.notes: Reverse direction from 0.0.52 deprecation (naming churn); kept verbatim per text.

entries.subject: PipelineParams.observers
entries.migration: Use the new PipelineTask observers parameter.

entries.subject: STTMuteFilter.stt_service
entries.migration: Filter now manages mute state internally.

entries.subject: AWSTTSService
entries.notes: Naming churn; later reversed (0.0.59 removes AWSTTSService pointing back to PollyTTSService, then 1.0.0 removes PollyTTSService alias -> AWSTTSService).

entries.subject: vad
entries.notes: Bare 'vad'/'audio.vad' package names as written in the bullet.

entries.subject: LLMResponseStartFrame
entries.migration: No longer needed; interruptions handled via StartInterruptionFrame.
